name: Fruit-Topped Almond Cream
recipeIngredient: 3 3/8 ounces instant French vanilla pudding mix
1/2 teaspoon almond extract or up to 3/4 teaspoon
3 cups assorted fruit (strawberries, grapes, raspberries, blueberries, mandarin oranges)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the pudding mix and milk. Beat on low speed for 2 minutes; set aside.
2. In a small mixing bowl, beat the cream and extract until stiff peaks form.
3. Gently fold the whipped mixture into the pudding.
4. Spoon the batter into a shallow 2-quart serving dish.
5. Chill completely.
6. Top with fruit just before serving.
Yield: 8 servings
